title: candollea squamellosa
intro: Candollea squamellosa, also known as Candollea, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Candollea include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and ease congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Candollea typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
